__rationale__: Triggering fixture for WR-24: For mammalian transient transfection, plate cells at 60–80 % confluence the day before; DNA:PEI mass ratio 1:3, 1 µg DNA per 1 × 10⁶ cells (default; per cell line).

construct.notes: T-405 fixture asserts rule-registry coverage; Phase 5/6 replaces stub semantics with executable predicate expectations.
